prompt:
Scene:
A square retail-ready campaign visual for Mascot IP Brand Collab, combining cute character appeal with polished commercial presentation. The composition should feel like a high-finish launch board: crisp packaging edges, collectible object staging, clean shelf or poster context, and vivid but controlled color. It should be immediately legible from far away, but still dense with charming small details that reward closer inspection.

Subject:
Build the image around Launch Poster, a frame that a clean release poster with cute emotional pull and unmistakable product focus. Translate Imagine premium brand collaborations between mascots and recognizable IP characters, spanning key art, packaging, in-store display, and social promo assets. into one lovable mascot, figure, or product system that feels ready for posters, boxes, stickers, inserts, or point-of-sale material. The result should feel like a fresh research image with clear commercial focus rather than random fan art. The main subject must remain unmistakable even when surrounded by accessories and display pieces.

Important details:
Charm alone is not enough. Preserve clean silhouette recognition, convincing package construction, reliable prop scale, and structured layout logic so the image feels sellable. This theme studies commercial-mockup, style-transfer, structured-layout, multi-image-reference through a production-ready visual system. Avoid noisy clutter; every secondary element should reinforce collectibility, retail desirability, or explainer clarity. Aim for clear hierarchy, polished craft, and immediately usable campaign logic.

Use case:
Mascot IP Brand Collab single study 4/5.

Constraints:
No readable text, no watermark, no logos, preserve exact 1:1 aspect ratio, no horror elements, no brand theft, no malformed packaging edges, no muddy mascot silhouette, no messy retail shelf, no chaotic prop overload.
title: Launch Poster
description: Launch Poster for Mascot IP Brand Collab, a clean release poster with cute emotional pull and unmistakable product focus.

generation.runner_notes: Independent single-image study with no runtime reference dependency.
